extName.message: DeBait – Tõelised YouTube’i pisipildid, ilma clickbait’ita
extName.description: Extension name / store title (shown in browser and store).

extDescription.message: Asendab YouTube’i clickbait-pisipildid automaatselt video tõelise esimese kaadriga. Kerge, privaatne, seadistuseta.
extDescription.description: Short description (manifest; Chrome caps at 132 chars).
